name: Dragon-Dodge
short_description: Embark on an epic adventure in Dragon-Dodge, where you play as a legendary dragon battling waves of enemies through campaign, quickplay, and endless modes, collecting coins and gems to customize your dragon and ultimately defeat the Wicked King for his legendary helmet.
detailed_description:
Dragon-Dodge

Soar into the skies as a majestic dragon in Dragon-Dodge, a thrilling arcade-style adventure with Old-School gameplay. Battle through relentless waves of enemies, earn coins and gems, and unlock a number of customization options to make your dragon truly yours. Will you rise as the ultimate dragon champion and take down the Wicked King to claim his legendary helmet?

Game Modes:

  • Campaign Mode: Embark on an epic journey through engaging levels as you face formidable foes and strive to defeat the Wicked King.

  • Quickplay: Challenge yourself in a variety of battles across multiple difficulty settings, aiming for the highest score and showing off your skills.

  • Endless Mode: Test your endurance in an unlimited battle against waves of enemies. How long can you survive?

With its homage to classic arcade gameplay, Dragon-Dodge is set to provide both nostalgic thrills and fresh experiences. Gather your strength, prepare for battle, and unleash your inner dragon today! Dive in and prove your worth in the skies!
